scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace apps/kiosk" "npm run dev --workspace apps/staff" "npm run dev --workspace apps/admin" "npm run dev --workspace server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/kiosk && npm run build --workspace apps/staff && npm run build --workspace apps/admin && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/kiosk && npm run lint --workspace apps/staff && npm run lint --workspace apps/admin && npm run lint --workspace server
